prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约7637名、6981名、11485名、7171名、17684名。2021–2024年位次在6981–11485间波动，2025年因山西省首年新高考改 革，物理类分设"再选化学"和"再选不限"两个专业组，不限组最低位次大幅后移至17684名，拉低了校整体最低位次；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年114人、2022年114人、2023年113人、2024年113人、2025年119人、2026年120人。2026年较2025年扩招1人（+0.84%），扩幅极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84之间，属中上水平211；该校近年声誉 平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100名，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注度处于正常水平；电气工程为A级学科（全国顶尖 ），动力工程及工程热物理为A-级，两大学科均为能源电力领域核心，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气类、计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热 度持续偏高；山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，考生总数下降理论上缓解竞争；该校位 于北京市，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；山西考生赴京求学意愿较高，北京高校在山西的报考热度持续稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年物理类不限组拉低位次的 基数效应、2026年招生计划中所有专业均要求"首选物理，再选化学"（取消不限组）使最低位次回升、考生总数小幅减少等因素，考虑专 业组结构调整带来的位次回升效应，预测2026年物理类最低位次约16273名，区间15773–16773名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 7637, 6981, 11485, 7171, and 17684 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 6981 and 11485 from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Shanxi Province, the Physics Category was divided into two major groups: 'Re-selection Chemistry' and 'Re-selection Unlimited'. The minimum ranking for the Unlimited group significantly dropped to 17684, lowering the overall minimum ranking of the university. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province for Science/Physics Category: 114 students in 2021, 114 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 113 in 2024, 119 in 2025, and 120 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 1 student (+0.84%), a very small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately ranked 84th, with stable rankings between 75 and 84 in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin has not entered the top 100 nationally, with average short video exposure and normal application attention. Electrical Engineering is an A-level discipline (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is an A- level discipline. Both are core fields in energy and electric power, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical, Computer, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, there are 167,419 Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025. The decline in total examinees theoretically eases competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. Shanxi students have a high willingness to study in Beijing, and the application popularity of Beijing universities in Shanxi remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, where the Physics Category Unlimited group lowered the ranking, the 2026 enrollment plan requiring all majors to have 'First Choice Physics, Re-selection Chemistry' (canceling the Unlimited group) will cause the minimum ranking to rebound, and the slight decrease in total examinees, along with the ranking recovery effect due to the adjustment of major group structure, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 16273, with a range of 15773 to 16773.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, all majors in the Physics Category require 'First Choice Physics, Re-selection Chemistry'. It is recommended that examinees with rankings within the predicted range of 15773 to 16773 focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15000) can prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors like Electrical and Computer. Those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (outside 16700) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission. Electrical Engineering and Automation (A-level discipline) is the core advantageous major of this university with broad employment prospects, worthy of priority consideration.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学 排名2026年约第84名，属中上水平211；该校近年声誉平稳，无负面舆情或投档异常记录；抖音关注度一般，报考热度处于正常水平；该校优 势学科集中于电气工程（A）和动力工程（A-），属理工类，文科专业无直接对应的A类学科支撑，文科专业报考热度相对平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业以法学、 网络与新媒体、行政管理、公共事业管理、英语、翻译为主，社会热度整体平稳；山西省2026年历史类考生63113人，较2025年84879人大幅减少约25.6%，考生总数显著下降有利 于缓解竞争；该校位于北京市，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；历史类招生人数较少（9人），招生规模小，位次波动相 对敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类招生计划扩招28.57%、考生总数大幅减少25.6%两大因素，供需两端均有利于位次后移（更易录取），预测2026年历史类最低位次约2400名，区间1968–2832名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Arts/History Category were approximately 1510, 1931, 1701, 2854, and 2074 respectively. In recent years, rankings have fluctuated between 1510 and 2854. In 2024, due to changes in the statistical scope of arts examinees, there was a significant backward shift. In 2025, the first year of the new Gaokao, the History Category ranking rebounded to 2074. The university's enrollment plan for Arts/History Category in Shanxi Province: 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 7 in 2025, and 9 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 2 students (+28.57%), a relatively large expansion that helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no negative public opinion or abnormal filing records. Its Douyin attention is average, and the application heat is at a normal level. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering (A-), which are science and engineering fields. There are no directly corresponding A-class disciplines supporting liberal arts majors, so the application heat for liberal arts majors remains relatively stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category enrollment majors mainly include Law, Network and New Media, Administrative Management, Public Affairs Management, English, and Translation, with overall social popularity being stable. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Shanxi Province is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025. The notable decline in the total number of examinees helps alleviate competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. The History Category enrollment number is small (9 students), and with such a small enrollment scale, ranking fluctuations are relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two major factors of a 28.57% expansion in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan and a 25.6% significant decrease in the total number of examinees, both supply and demand sides favor a backward shift in rankings (easier admission). It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 History Category will be approximately 2400, with a range of 1968 to 2832.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the History Category enrollment plan expands to 9 students, and the total number of examinees significantly decreases, increasing admission opportunities. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 1968–2832 focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 as a stretch. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1900) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Law and Network and New Media. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (outside 2800) are advised to use Tier 3 language majors as a safety net. Although the university's liberal arts majors are not its core strength, relying on the 211 platform and Beijing's regional advantages, employment competitiveness is still guaranteed.
